LORE

it is the year 2024. in this world, Monsters, Magical People, and other stuff are normal. magical energy is fueled by emotions and are usually obtained by being given them by other beings, but there are exceptions........ what one's transformation and powers are, depends on their soul (AKA true self).

most magicals are part of organizations, and there are two major ones. the Magical Saviors, led by divine beings, is the largest organization of magical people, operating in semi-secret and requiring their 'Saviors" to hide their identities. they recruit people who are pure of heart and willing to join. The other one, Eclipse, is a secretive villain organization that seeks to tear down the world’s ideals of love, order, and mercy, believing only the strong should shape destiny. Operating from the shadows, they orchestrate disasters, unleash powerful monsters, and corrupt society, all to bring about a new era where chaos and strength reign supreme.

magical entities are classed from F- to SSS++ based on their maximum strength and power. F- are weak and able to be taken out by an athletic human, while SSS++ are strong enough to threaten multiple cities. these classifications are called Threat Class/Power Class.
